examples: Extraembryonic mesoderm migrates through primitive streak to the presumptive yolk sac between days 6.5 and 7.0 of gestation.
Tetraploid cells are preferentially allocated to the extraembryonic tissues, such as placenta, rather than the fetus itself.
Ultrasonography had great advantage over MRI in showing yolk sacs, amniotic sacs, extraembryonic coelom and embryocardia-beats ( P< 0.005).
